name: Herbed Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the feta cheese into a bowl of food processor with the chopping blade intact.
2. Mash the garlic clove with the flat edge of a knife or in a garlic press and add it to the processor bowl.
3. Add the herbs: fresh chives cut into 3-inch pieces, and chopped fresh basil, parsley, and thyme leaves.
4. Fresh dill weed should be chopped (optional). No specific quantities are given for the fresh herbs; adjust according to personal taste.
5. If substituting dried herbs, start with approximately 1/2 teaspoon of dried basil, 1 tablespoon each of chopped chives and parsley, and 1/4 teaspoon each of thyme and dill. Add more of any herb if desired.
6. Process until the herbs are finely chopped.
7. Add the cream cheese and sour cream to the processor. Continue processing until reaching the desired consistency; add more sour cream for a softer spread.
8. Makes about one pint.
